title: Emoticon boot preload
summary: Loads the classic emoticon catalog at chat-page startup and warms image assets during browser idle time so users do not have to open the emoticon picker before the pack is ready.
manual_test: Open /chat after login and confirm /api/emoticons/catalog loads during page boot.
Wait briefly, open the emoticon picker, and confirm the first visible emoticons appear without waiting for a first-click catalog fetch.
Type a shortcut such as :)) in room chat/PM/group chat and confirm it renders as the image emoticon.
